title: Marketplace Manager - Livspace - Immediate Joiners Preferred

jsonLd.title: Marketplace Manager - Livspace - Immediate Joiners Preferred
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Livspace. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Marketplace Manager to strengthen our Mumbai-based team.

About Livspace:
Livspace is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Analyze sales data and customer behavior to drive revenue growth
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Tech / B.E. in Computer Science or related discipline
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Email Marketing
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Annual performance appraisal
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Livspace!
